name: Wrist Guards
descs:
Turn Start: allies with 5+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 1 [AttackDmgUp].

If the ally has Pride Affinity Attack Skills, gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] instead.

Turn Start: allies with 3+ ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 1 [AttackDmgUp].

If the ally has Pride Affinity Attack Skills, gain 2 [AttackDmgUp] instead.

Turn Start: allies with ([Charge] Count + 'Unique Charge') gain 2 [AttackDmgUp].

If the ally has Pride Affinity Attack Skills, gain 3 [AttackDmgUp] instead.
